long_univariate.description: Gold-price-only long history for univariate/reference models.

core_multivariate.description: Core multivariate window for structural/deep models. High_yield excluded from main model.

training_windows.live_mode_note: If live mode uses post-cutoff spot API data, final effective_data_through_date must not exceed the latest valid required manual factor date.

notes: Training windows are governance defaults for Phase 2.
Later scripts may create model-specific windows, but must preserve this artifact as the source of cutoff truth.
